electroacoustic.max_spl_note: 137 dB peak at 1 m, free field, pink noise crest factor 4, [SYVA] preset. The datasheet cover cites 142 dB as a marketing figure; the specification table value is 137 dB.
electroacoustic.directivity: Horizontal 140 deg, vertical +5/-21 deg in J-shape (above 1 kHz); colinear source pattern (~140 x 26 deg)
electroacoustic.components: Colinear source: 6 x 5" MF speakers (bass-reflex, L-Vents) + 3 x 1.75" HF compression-driver diaphragms loaded by DOSC waveguides with L-Fins, in a J-shaped progressive curvature; 2-way passive

amplification.preset_note: [SYVA] is the standalone reference preset. The hybrid presets and the _100 LF presets apply when Syva is coupled with Syva Low or Syva Sub via AutoConnect. Reduced max SPL/drive capacity when powered by LA2Xi.

connection.input_connector: 1x 4-point speakON (NL4) IN; alternative screw terminal (IN+/IN-); plus AutoConnect for hybrid stacking on Syva Low/Sub. Use only one connector type at a time. speakON is only accessible when Syva Wall is used with a wedge.
connection.breakouts: SP-Y1 (4-point speakON to 2x 2-point speakON, with CC4FP adapter), DOSUB-LA8, DOFILL-LA8, DO3WFILL PA-COM breakout cables for multi-enclosure powering

physical.dimensions_mm: 1301 (H) x 209 (W) x 170 (D), front face; 144 mm rear width, 1304 mm rear height (tapered cabinet)
physical.cabinet: First-grade Baltic beech and birch plywood; steel grille with anti-corrosion coating and acoustically neutral 3D fabric; fine-grain dark grey-brown Pantone 426C finish (custom RAL colors available)

modes: Stacked on Syva Low or Syva Sub (Syva Base, AutoConnect)
Flown (Syva Bar with provided 12 mm shackle WLL 1 t, or secured to structure via CLAMP250)
deployment.max_per_flown_array: 1 (Syva is deployed as a single standalone element per mount point, not a multi-box flown array)
deployment.rigging_note: DIN580-compatible M8 threaded insert for secondary safety plus 2 integrated inserts for rigging accessories. Four magnets/lodgings on the cabinet base mate with studs on Syva Low/Sub for secure stacking. Do not ground-stack Syva without Syva Base.

usage: Compact colinear (line source) point-of-sale speaker for medium-throw reinforcement up to about 35 m, well suited to architectural installs, corporate events, performing-arts venues, houses of worship, and high-end residential or L-ISA immersive setups where wide 140-degree horizontal coverage with low visual impact is wanted.
Each enclosure needs one amplifier channel; size racks by the per-amp limits: up to 12 Syva on an LA12X, 10 on an LA7.16i, and 4 on an LA4X (or 4 single-ended / 2 bridged on LA2Xi).

Standalone Syva is limited to 87 Hz on the low end, so pair it with LF extensions for full-range program: 1:1 with Syva Low extends response to ~40 Hz (9 dB contour), while adding 2 Syva Sub per Syva Low/Syva reaches down to 27 Hz (12 dB contour).

When stacking on Syva Low or Syva Sub, drive the system through AutoConnect and load the matching hybrid/LF presets ([SYVA] plus [SYVA LOW_100] / [SYVA SUB_100]); do not also use the speakON or screw-terminal inputs in that configuration.

Deploy as a single element per mount: ground-stacked on Syva Base, on a sub, wall-mounted, pole-mounted, or flown on Syva Bar - never ground-stack without Syva Base, and use the DIN580 M8 insert for a secondary safety tether.
Rated IP54 with sealed connector covers, making it viable for protected outdoor and demanding install environments when the gaskets are properly fitted.
